calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-14-2015 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Mtn For Prove Up Hearing For Default Judgment
Off Calendar Apr-14-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514. Judge: Leslie C. Nichols; Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Mitch L. Lyon, #6870

Jill Bates-Moore, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank, N.A.
No appearance by defendant Andrew G. Elliott.
Default was entered against defendant on September 23, 2014.
Doe defendants were dismissed on September 23, 2014.
Order waiving witness appearance at prove-up hearing was filed today, April 14, 2015.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank, N.A., and against the Defaulted Defendant Andrew G. Elliott, an individual, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $29,556.72.
Costs - $520.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $30,076.72.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
